emptyDay.title: No meals on this day
emptyDay.subtitle_today: Add your first meal to start tracking.
emptyDay.subtitle_offline_today: You are offline. Local data may be incomplete for today.
emptyDay.subtitle_offline_past: You are offline. Connect to load meals for this day.
emptyDay.coachHint_today: Start with one complete meal log so coaching has real data to work with.
emptyDay.coachHint_past: Use history for context, then keep the next meal log complete so trends stay readable.
emptyDay.coachHint_insufficient_today: There is not enough recent signal yet. One solid meal log today is enough to restart the pattern.
emptyDay.coachHint_insufficient_past: There is not enough recent signal yet. Review history, then keep the next meal log complete.

coachInsight.whyTitle: This is based on your recent logging

reasons.valid_logging_days_7_low: There have been too few solid logging days recently.
reasons.logging_consistency_28_low: Logging consistency across the last few weeks is still low.
reasons.missing_nutrition_meals_today: At least one meal today is missing useful nutrition detail.
reasons.unknown_meal_details_14_high: Recent meals have been too vague to read clearly.
reasons.protein_hit_ratio_14_low: Protein targets are being missed on too many logged days.
reasons.kcal_under_target_ratio_14_high: Recent intake is landing under your calorie target too often.
reasons.meal_coverage_14_low: There are too few complete meal days to read the pattern well.
reasons.streak_positive: You have recent momentum worth protecting.
reasons.consistency_improving: Logging consistency is moving in the right direction.
reasons.insufficient_data: There is not enough recent data to form a stronger insight yet.
reasons.generic: This insight comes from your recent logging pattern.
